post.content:
Mr. Cumberbatch is the Godfather of the town. People of different gangs have started fighting each other. Being the Godfather, he wants to keep the violence to a minimum. Since everyone respects him, the gangs stop fighting.

He has a vehicle in which Y people can sit at a time.

He has made a hate matrix, which has N pairs (m,n), [1 < m <-X and 1 <= n <= X) each pair means that person m hates n, and they can travel together but will start fighting if they are left together at one place. Mr.Cumberbatch has to find out the many minimum number of trips his vehicle will have to make to transport all the people without any fights.

Build adjacency list for each person to list enemies. Also maintain a vector/array/list to keep count of enemies for each person.
Starting from person 0 to (max count of people), go through each person whose number of enemies is > 0, put them in car and go through list of enemies and decrement their count of enemies.

4 people
(p0,p1),  (p0,p2)

enemy count - > [2,1,1,0]
person with enemy count 0 is either in car or does not need to be in car (since he will not cause fights)

1. Increment rounds of car
2. go through list of people and pick one that has enemies
3. put person in car (decrement car count from Y to 0)
4. Mark this persons enemies as 0, and also decrement count of enemies'(using adjacency list) enemy
5. If people in car reaches 0, reset it to Y and start with 1, or if no more people with enemies with count > 0, break;
